artwork.title: co
artwork.principle: These are not bad images. They are polished but wrong implementations of the artwork.
artwork.core_invariant: co is a silent live generative public apparatus in which ambiguous bodies, routes, windows of time, and signals temporarily produce place.
artwork.use_instruction: Use these anti-references to identify rejected visual/conceptual failure modes. Do not imitate these images. Use the captions and repair instructions to steer away from each failure while preserving the positive invariants of co.

items.label: reject
items.sidecar_caption: Wrong because routed paths become a readable transit map; co must instead treat routes as temporary behavioral tendencies and pressure fields produced by bodies, signals, delays, and shared attention.
items.diagnostic_summary: The image is polished, dark, luminous, and structurally clear, but the routes are too legible as transportation infrastructure. The network reads as a map rather than as behavior.
why_it_fails: Routes become fixed diagrammatic lines instead of temporary pressures or tendencies.
Nodes become transfer points rather than moments of co-presence.
The system implies transit legibility rather than place emerging from relation.
The viewer reads transportation design before public apparatus behavior.
items.repair_instruction: Return the routes to ambiguous behavioral pressure fields. Keep luminous paths and relation, but make them provisional, activated by bodies and signals, not readable as a stable transit map.
preferred_replacement_features: soft route traces that emerge from use
items.prompt_time_negative: Do not make the routed paths read as a subway map, rail diagram, transit schematic, or clean network topology.
items.prompt_time_positive: Treat routes as temporary behavioral tendencies and pressure fields produced by agents, signals, delays, and shared attention.

items.label: reject
items.sidecar_caption: Wrong because the work dissolves into decorative atmosphere and loses the structured relations, public tension, and behavioral specificity that define co.
items.diagnostic_summary: The image is beautiful and cinematic, but it becomes ambient light atmosphere. It lacks agents, public tension, signal behavior, co-presence, and structured relational logic.
why_it_fails: Beauty becomes decorative rather than systemic.
The image contains glow and atmosphere but no public apparatus behavior.
There is no sense of agents negotiating place.
No routes, windows, signals, delays, or earned synchronization are legible.
items.repair_instruction: Keep the beauty and dark luminous atmosphere, but reintroduce structured relations: agents, route pressure, temporal windows, signal fields, co-presence, interruption, and rare synchronization.
items.prompt_time_negative: Do not let the work become a beautiful ambient light spectacle, decorative mist, or generic generative screensaver.
items.prompt_time_positive: Make beauty arise from structured relations between agents, routes, windows, signals, delay, and temporary co-presence.

items.label: reject
items.sidecar_caption: Wrong because the ambiguity collapses into literal people and narrative transit illustration, reducing the work to a scene about transit rather than a system producing place.
items.diagnostic_summary: The image becomes a narrative scene of commuters. It may be visually impressive, but the bodies are too literal, individualized, and socially illustrative.
why_it_fails: Ambiguous bodies collapse into recognizable commuters.
The work becomes a scene about transit rather than a system producing place.
Narrative human detail overwhelms generative public-apparatus behavior.
Phones, clothing, bags, and posture turn agents into characters.
items.repair_instruction: Replace literal commuters with ambiguous bodies that could also be vehicles, packets, air currents, memory traces, or small public events. Preserve collectivity without turning agents into characters.
items.prompt_time_negative: Do not depict recognizable commuters, faces, clothing, phones, bags, or a narrative public transit crowd.
items.prompt_time_positive: Use ambiguous bodies that remain suspended between person, vehicle, packet, air current, memory trace, and public event.

items.label: reject
items.sidecar_caption: Wrong because the image imitates transit branding, wayfinding, signage, bullets, or map logic; co should address public infrastructure without becoming a transit-brand graphic system.
items.diagnostic_summary: The image is graphically crisp and public-infrastructure adjacent, but it borrows too strongly from signage, wayfinding, transit bullets, and branded diagram systems.
why_it_fails: The image becomes a graphic identity system instead of a live public apparatus.
Wayfinding logic replaces generative behavior.
Circular markers and arrows imply signage rather than co-presence.
Transit-brand familiarity overdetermines the work.
items.repair_instruction: Keep civic clarity and restrained primary color, but remove wayfinding grammar. Let public infrastructure appear through behavior, not branding.
items.prompt_time_negative: Do not imitate subway branding, wayfinding systems, route bullets, arrows, station signage, or modular transit graphics.
items.prompt_time_positive: Address public infrastructure through generative behavior, signal fields, ambiguous agents, and temporary place formation.

items.label: reject
items.sidecar_caption: Wrong because the image becomes a control interface or data dashboard; co must feel like a public apparatus in operation, not a visualization panel explaining itself.
items.diagnostic_summary: The image becomes an explanatory UI. It appears to monitor or control a system rather than being the system itself.
why_it_fails: Dashboard panels replace embodied generative behavior.
The work becomes explanatory rather than operative.
Charts, widgets, ticks, and overlays imply control-room distance.
The viewer reads interface design before public place formation.
items.repair_instruction: Remove the dashboard layer. Let the system be seen directly as a public apparatus in operation, with agents, fields, and signals behaving rather than being monitored.
preferred_replacement_features: place-fields appearing as events, not readouts
items.prompt_time_negative: Do not create a dashboard, HUD, control interface, data visualization, monitoring screen, or explanatory panel layout.
items.prompt_time_positive: Show the public apparatus itself in operation: agents, routes, windows, signals, and co-presence forming place without UI explanation.

items.label: reject
items.sidecar_caption: Wrong because the image turns public space into cinematic surveillance architecture; co should feel collective and civic, not militarized, paranoid, or authoritarian.
items.diagnostic_summary: The image becomes a surveillance or command system. Its public space is controlled, tracked, and militarized rather than collectively produced.
why_it_fails: Signal control becomes authoritarian command.
Bodies become targets or tracked objects.
Scanning beams and targeting grids produce paranoia rather than civic collectivity.
The image suggests observation and enforcement instead of co-presence.
items.repair_instruction: Preserve signal behavior but remove surveillance grammar. Signals should coordinate and condition public relation, not target, police, or command bodies.
preferred_replacement_features: ambiguous bodies without boxes or reticles
items.prompt_time_negative: Do not make the image feel like surveillance, targeting, policing, militarized command, drones, or authoritarian city control.
items.prompt_time_positive: Make signal control feel civic and relational: a public apparatus coordinating temporary co-presence without targeting or command.

items.label: reject
items.sidecar_caption: Wrong because architectural spectacle replaces system behavior; co should generate place through agents, routes, windows, and signals, not through fantasy buildings or impossible stations.
items.diagnostic_summary: The image becomes dominated by speculative architecture. The visual interest comes from impossible spaces rather than from the behavior of a live generative system.
why_it_fails: Architecture becomes the subject instead of the condition.
Spectacular buildings replace agents, routes, windows, and signals.
The image depicts an impossible place rather than producing place.
Cinematic depth and monumentality overpower behavioral specificity.
items.repair_instruction: Reduce architecture to background condition or remove it entirely. Let place emerge from agent behavior, routes, temporal windows, signal fields, and rare synchronization.
preferred_replacement_features: architecture implied by fields rather than depicted
items.prompt_time_negative: Do not make the image a fantasy building, impossible station, architectural concept art, or luminous civic hall.
items.prompt_time_positive: Make the visual power come from live system behavior: agents, routes, windows, signals, co-presence, and rare synchronization.

items.label: reject
items.sidecar_caption: Wrong because particles become ornamental motion; co needs agents with routing, delay, co-presence, and rare synchronization, not abstract shimmer.
items.diagnostic_summary: The image is computational and visually attractive, but particles remain ornamental. They do not become agents within a public system.
why_it_fails: Particles form beautiful swarms without public behavior.
Motion is ornamental rather than routed, delayed, or relational.
There are no windows of time, signals, co-presence, or place-fields.
The system lacks tension, interruption, and earned synchronization.
avoid_in_future: particle beauty without routing or delay
items.repair_instruction: Keep particle richness only if particles behave as agents in a public apparatus. Add routing, delay, signal windows, co-presence, interruption, and rare synchronization.
items.prompt_time_negative: Do not create a decorative particle screensaver, abstract shimmer field, ornamental swarm, or generic computational bokeh.
items.prompt_time_positive: Make particles behave as ambiguous public agents with routing, delay, co-presence, signal windows, and rare earned synchronization.
